violations.description: Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
violations.help: ARIA attributes must conform to valid values

violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

violations.description: Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements have an accessible name
violations.help: Frames must have an accessible name
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

violations.description: Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
violations.help: Zooming and scaling must not be disabled

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
